description: An LLC needs to file its required annual report with the state's Secretary of State to remain in good standing.

nodes.task_description: Look up the due date and filing fee for the annual report in the specific state.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the correct deadline and fee.

nodes.task_description: Update any required information, such as the company's registered agent or principal address.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent ensures all company information is current.

nodes.task_description: Prepare and file the annual report with the state and pay the fee.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully completes the compliance filing.
